why_it_matters: Utility insecurity is an actionable PRAPARE social need that could trigger resource referrals and complete the SDOH picture central to this visit.
An administered vaccine must be documented with product, route, and site for the immunization record and to prevent duplicate dosing.
Documenting side-effect counseling supports informed consent but has limited clinical impact if omitted.
The PRAPARE stress rating substantiates the documented stress/isolation assessment but omission does not change management already addressed.
